creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
I'd like to release java/eclipse-cdt to pool.

Frankly I haven't used eclipse since I first updated this port.
Back then I was looking for better IDE, but it turns out, eclipse
didn't have any advantage over my IDE of past, present and future
(editors/vim)

Let someone who use eclipse maintain this port :)

Perhaps freebsd-eclipse@FreeBSD.org would maintain it?
